_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: microglia from male, but not female, Nf1flox/wt; hGFAP-Cre mice had decreased ramification...number of branch points per microglial cell was reduced in male Nf1flox/wt; hGFAP-Cre (32 ± 1) compared to WT microglia (42 ± 1; p < 0.0001)
details: Successfully deleted Nf1 in neural progenitor cells by embryonic day 16.5, reproducing the sexually dimorphic microglia morphology defects seen in germline Nf1± mice
